headline_original: Ministry of Marine Wealth calls for strict compliance with seasonal fishing ban
article_snippet: The Ministry of Marine Wealth has called on fishermen, fishing vessel owners, trawler operators, fish traders, and all workers in the marine fishing sector to strictly comply with regulations governing the seasonal ban on the fishing, sale, and trade of certain fish species. According to the ministry, the measures are intended to protect fish stocks, support their long-term sustainability, and safeguard marine life during breeding seasons.

headline_original: انتصار شنيب أول امرأة تقود ناديا رياضيا في تاريخ ليبيا
article_snippet: لأول مرة في تاريخ ليبيا، تتولى النائبة انتصار شنيب رئاسة نادي “دارنس” الرياضي بالتزكية، لتقود مسيرة إعادة بنائه بعد أزمات متراكمة وإعصار دانييل.
